title: IMD issues yellow alert for Mumbai, Thane and Palghar; warns of hot and humid weather conditions - Mid-day
search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Maharashtra
full_text:
IMD issues yellow alert for Mumbai, Thane and Palghar; warns of hot and humid weather conditions
The weather bulletin stated that hot and humid conditions were likely in parts of Maharashtra and there was a possibility of light rain or thundershowers towards afternoon or evening
The daytime temperatures were expected to remain high ion Friday. File Pic
The Indian Meteorological Department (IMD) on Friday issued a yellow alert for Mumbai, Thane, Palghar and other parts of Maharashtra, predicting hot weather.
The weather department predicted that hot and humid conditions were very likely at isolated places.
